title: Maalaala mo kaya?
writer: Fausto J. Galauran, Conrado Conde, Luciano B. Carlos
actors: Carmen Rosales, Rogelio de la Rosa, Patria Plata
plot: A classic love story between a composer and a singer, and the song they put together. Celso's (Rogelio dela Rosa) mother's eyesight is failing. Celso, an undiscovered pianist, puts his fortune to the test and goes to the city for ...
